LobsterLimitDesc: The maximum number of openclaw a user can create

All models are available for this package, 
adding models to the available area will allow independent setting of billing methods

singleTaskSingleRoundConsumptionLimitDes: Controls the maximum points consumption per round for a single task

singleUserMaxExecutionRoundsDesc: Controls the maximum number of execution rounds for a single task per user
